why: CHART: price flushed to day-low 7533.75 then reversed up to 7536.55 (10:30 candle low-then-close-higher hammer), 5-min momentum decelerating -0.08%; oversold bounce off the low with price below VWAP 7555 = room to mean-revert up. GEX CONFIRM: 7530 pika floor (+10.5M) held its first test, regime still POSITIVE-gamma (+71M) which favors mean-reversion up, king pin 7560 sits 24pts overhead as the magnet/target with no wall in between. Long the exhaustion-V off the held floor, target VWAP 7555 / pin 7560, stop on decisive break below 7530.

CHART: bounce carried from 7533.75 low to 7548.85 (+12.3pts), price now at prior-range midpoint and into VWAP 7554 confluence resistance; mean-reversion target reached. GEX: price arrived at the 7550 king pika pin (+22M) — the opposing node I targeted — with net gamma very strong +109M, so this pin will pin/reject. Cap the 0DTE winner into the opposing node per method rather than chase the last points into a strong pin.

CHART: price held the 7535 floor and printed a green reversal candle (11:30: 7536.8->7539.3 closing on its high), turning up from the lower box (18% of range) while below VWAP 7549 = room to revert. GEX CONFIRM: net gamma surged to an extreme +134M (strongest pin of the day), king pika pin 7550 (+30M) sits 11pts overhead as the mean-reversion magnet, floor held (+14.9M). Positive-gamma reversion long off a held, strengthening floor toward the 7550 pin; cut on a decisive break below 7535.

CHART: reversion thesis stalled — price rejected at 7544 and drifted back to 7538.65 (16% of range) with momentum turning negative, failing to make progress toward the 7550 pin. GEX: extreme +127M pin is grinding sideways (chops price down as much as up); a 0DTE long only bleeds theta here. Exit fast near breakeven per manage-rule since the push-to-pin thesis broke; preserve capital rather than hold a decaying option into a dead pin.
